definition: An article of clothing that is worn on the upper part of the body, and often has sleeves, either long or short, that cover the arms.
example: It can take a while to learn how to iron a shirt properly.
exampleVi: Có thể mất một thời gian để học cách ủi áo sơ mi đúng cách.

definition: (Manchester) An outer garment that covers the body from the waist downwards, covering each leg separately, usually as far as the ankles; trousers.
example: We need to understand the concept of pants.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về quần.

definition: An article of clothing that covers the part of the body between the waist and the ankles or knees, and is divided into a separate part for each leg.
example: The trousers need to be shortened.
exampleVi: Quần cần được cắt ngắn lại.

definition: A piece of clothing worn on the upper body outside a shirt or blouse, often waist length to thigh length.
example: We need to understand the concept of jacket.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về áo khoác.

definition: An outer garment covering the upper torso and arms.Wp
example: We need to understand the concept of coat.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về áo khoác.

definition: An item of clothing (usually worn by a woman or young girl) which both covers the upper part of the body and includes skirts below the waist.
example: Amy and Mary looked very pretty in their dresses.
exampleVi: Amy và Mary trông rất xinh đẹp trong bộ váy của họ.

definition: An article of clothing, usually worn by women and girls, that hangs from the waist and covers the lower part of the body.
example: We need to understand the concept of skirt.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm váy.

definition: A set of clothes to be worn together, now especially a man's matching jacket and trousers (also business suit or lounge suit), or a similar outfit for a woman.
example: Nick hired a navy-blue suit for the wedding.
exampleVi: Nick đã thuê một bộ đồ màu xanh nước biển cho đám cưới.

definition: A knot; a fastening.
example: We need to understand the concept of tie.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm cà vạt.

definition: A covering for the head, often in the approximate form of a cone or a cylinder closed at its top end, and sometimes having a brim and other decoration.
example: We need to understand the concept of hat.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về chiếc mũ.

definition: A knitted or woven covering for the foot.
example: We need to understand the concept of socks.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về tất.

definition: A protective covering for the foot, with a bottom part composed of thick leather or plastic sole and often a thicker heel, and a softer upper part made of leather or synthetic material. Shoes generally do not extend above the ankle, as opposed to boots, which do.
example: Get your shoes on now, or you'll be late for school.
exampleVi: Hãy mang giày vào ngay nếu không sẽ muộn học.

definition: A heavy shoe that covers part of the leg.
example: We need to understand the concept of boots.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về ủng.

definition: An item of clothing other than a mitten, covering all or part of the hand and fingers, but usually allowing independent movement of the fingers.
example: I wore gloves to keep my hands warm.
exampleVi: Tôi đeo găng tay để giữ ấm tay.

definition: A long, often knitted, garment worn around the neck.
example: We need to understand the concept of scarf.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về chiếc khăn quàng cổ.

definition: A band worn around the waist to hold clothing to one's body (usually pants), hold weapons (such as a gun or sword), or serve as a decorative piece of clothing.
example: As part of the act, the fat clown's belt broke, causing his pants to fall down.
exampleVi: Khi đang biểu diễn, thắt lưng của chú hề béo bị đứt khiến quần của anh ta tụt xuống.

definition: A bag stitched to an item of clothing, used for carrying small items.
example: We need to understand the concept of pocket.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm túi.

definition: One who adjusts, especially for the insurance industry's employment title "loss adjuster" (or "claims adjuster" in the United States).
example: We need to understand the concept of button.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về nút.

definition: A zip fastener.
example: We need to understand the concept of zipper.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về dây kéo.

definition: Anything that encircles the neck.
example: We need to understand the concept of collar.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về cổ áo.
